charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake taxonomic names

Source: R/taxonomy.R
taxonomy.Rd

Create fake taxonomic names

ch_taxonomic_genus(n = 1)

ch_taxonomic_epithet(n = 1)

ch_taxonomic_species(n = 1)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

Names

Names were taken from Theplantlist. 500 genera names and 500 epithets were chosen at random from the set of 10,000 names in the dataset in the taxize package. Theplantlist is, as it says on the tin, composed of plant names - so these fake names are derived from plant names if that matters to you. These may generate names that match those of real taxa, but may not as well.

Taxonomic authority

Randomly, the taxonomic authority is in parentheses - which represents that the given authority was not the original authority.

See also

TaxonomyProvider

Examples

ch_taxonomic_genus()

#> [1] "Brachyscias"
ch_taxonomic_genus(10)

#>  [1] "Pseudanthus" "Thelymitra"  "Dichopogon"  "Wissadula"   "Nephromeria"
#>  [6] "Cullumia"    "Moraea"      "Eriosorus"   "Fagelia"     "Andromeda"  
ch_taxonomic_genus(500)

#>   [1] "Cyanea"             "Scorzonera"         "Camptochaete"      
#>   [4] "Ballota"            "Asclepias"          "Gymnobalanus"      
#>   [7] "Cerasus"            "Meteorium"          "Thamnium"          
#>  [10] "Sapium"             "Vriesea"            "Inuleae"           
#>  [13] "Mollugo"            "Normanbya"          "Lansium"           
#>  [16] "Gollania"           "Pelekium"           "Codonopsis"        
#>  [19] "Chusquea"           "Leptarrhena"        "Tristemon"         
#>  [22] "Crossostemma"       "Holostigma"         "Acmella"           
#>  [25] "Normanbya"          "Piptocarpha"        "Fagara"            
#>  [28] "Monosalpinx"        "Lantana"            "Argyrochosma"      
#>  [31] "Dissochaeta"        "Terminalia"         "Mayna"             
#>  [34] "Elettariopsis"      "Ampelocissus"       "Tylophora"         
#>  [37] "Kosteletzkya"       "Codonopsis"         "Amsonia"           
#>  [40] "Prunus"             "Baijiania"          "Ellipanthus"       
#>  [43] "Tilia"              "Rhizomnium"         "Xysmalobium"       
#>  [46] "Mormodes"           "Helemonium"         "Leiomela"          
#>  [49] "Sertuernera"        "Plagiobryum"        "Vernonanthura"     
#>  [52] "Sprekelia"          "Doryphora"          "Leontodon"         
#>  [55] "Pichleria"          "Ligusticum"         "Talinum"           
#>  [58] "Dampiera"           "Eriosorus"          "Gollania"          
#>  [61] "Hyoscyamus"         "Themistoclesia"     "Vernonanthura"     
#>  [64] "Diplophyllum"       "Platystele"         "Gentianella"       
#>  [67] "Succisa"            "Diaphananthe"       "Draba"             
#>  [70] "Kalanchoe"          "Lagoseris"          "Elegia"            
#>  [73] "Monosalpinx"        "Platystele"         "Kleinia"           
#>  [76] "Asarum"             "Anomobryum"         "Themeda"           
#>  [79] "Tylimanthus"        "Chrysoscias"        "Dimerodontium"     
#>  [82] "Dimerodontium"      "Dufrenoya"          "Psylliostachys"    
#>  [85] "Spinifex"           "Goebelia"           "Calicotome"        
#>  [88] "Spermacoce"         "Microctenidium"     "Leontodon"         
#>  [91] "Urera"              "Phyla"              "Erigeron"          
#>  [94] "Haworthia"          "Styphelia"          "Dampiera"          
#>  [97] "Dacryodes"          "Calea"              "Tilia"             
#> [100] "Pulmonaria"         "Porella"            "Pariana"           
#> [103] "Psylliostachys"     "Anisopappus"        "Bathmium"          
#> [106] "Terminalia"         "Dicraeia"           "Lysipomia"         
#> [109] "Oldfieldia"         "Lagoseris"          "Lepidagathis"      
#> [112] "Anacampseros"       "Adenophorus"        "Zelkova"           
#> [115] "Jumellea"           "Sclerophylax"       "Calicotome"        
#> [118] "Erepsia"            "Sphaeropteris"      "Andryala"          
#> [121] "Gollania"           "Pseudocephalozia"   "Meteorium"         
#> [124] "Kleinia"            "Paederota"          "Schizostachyum"    
#> [127] "Ophrys"             "Aglaomorpha"        "Psidium"           
#> [130] "Erigeron"           "Plectanthera"       "Galedupa"          
#> [133] "Retiniphyllum"      "Phymaspermum"       "Eucharis"          
#> [136] "Randia"             "Origanum"           "Echinops"          
#> [139] "Dissochaeta"        "Terminalia"         "Mostacillastrum"   
#> [142] "Litsea"             "Lavatera"           "Doryphora"         
#> [145] "Microlicia"         "Dyckia"             "Trichodesma"       
#> [148] "Claoxylon"          "Cracca"             "Danthoniopsis"     
#> [151] "Perebea"            "Ebenus"             "Narcissus"         
#> [154] "Chesneya"           "Lagoseris"          "Viburnum"          
#> [157] "Brachyscias"        "Antrocaryon"        "Dicraeia"          
#> [160] "Brickellia"         "Adenophorus"        "Schizostachyum"    
#> [163] "Triaenophora"       "Stachys"            "Gyroweisia"        
#> [166] "Urceocharis"        "Warczewiczella"     "Urera"             
#> [169] "Chloropatane"       "Aspidonepsis"       "Polypodium"        
#> [172] "Rinorea"            "Lacaena"            "Croton"            
#> [175] "Alhagi"             "Lethedon"           "Alansmia"          
#> [178] "Ectropothecium"     "Eriosorus"          "Coelostegia"       
#> [181] "Diospyros"          "Gordonia"           "Sedum"             
#> [184] "Deeringia"          "Cochlearia"         "Dasispermum"       
#> [187] "Cayratia"           "Amsonia"            "Microtropis"       
#> [190] "Aphananthe"         "Orchicoeloglossum"  "Christella"        
#> [193] "Monosalpinx"        "Oedicladium"        "Oldfieldia"        
#> [196] "Lapathum"           "Codonopsis"         "Tripleurothemis"   
#> [199] "Psylliostachys"     "Fagonia"            "Kosteletzkya"      
#> [202] "Rumohra"            "Piratinera"         "Bencomia"          
#> [205] "Microlicia"         "Senecio"            "Thibaudia"         
#> [208] "Chrysoscias"        "Heterostemon"       "Lacaena"           
#> [211] "Vernonanthura"      "Oedicladium"        "Cyanea"            
#> [214] "Anaphyllopsis"      "Ligusticum"         "Mollugo"           
#> [217] "Lysipomia"          "Brickellia"         "Lethedon"          
#> [220] "Gastrodia"          "Viscum"             "Huperzia"          
#> [223] "Solms-laubachia"    "Neostapfiella"      "Meineckia"         
#> [226] "Molinaea"           "Drypetes"           "Smallanthus"       
#> [229] "Orchicoeloglossum"  "Lantana"            "Triaenophora"      
#> [232] "Cracca"             "Macrozamia"         "Adiscanthus"       
#> [235] "Chesneya"           "Stachys"            "Aloinella"         
#> [238] "Lepidagathis"       "Aspidonepsis"       "Cephalorhizum"     
#> [241] "Podotheca"          "Chesneya"           "Triaenophora"      
#> [244] "Medicago"           "Doryphora"          "Thecacoris"        
#> [247] "Croton"             "Narcissus"          "Antirhea"          
#> [250] "Excoecaria"         "Draba"              "Dicranum"          
#> [253] "Limnia"             "Cullumia"           "Astroloma"         
#> [256] "Asclepias"          "Nephelium"          "Bromus"            
#> [259] "Microlicia"         "Asplenidictyum"     "Cayratia"          
#> [262] "Stylochiton"        "Hexalobus"          "Sceletium"         
#> [265] "Harrisia"           "Thuidiopsis"        "Mascagnia"         
#> [268] "Raddia"             "Goebelia"           "Thuidiopsis"       
#> [271] "Pachyveria"         "Neoapaloxylon"      "Moraea"            
#> [274] "Anemia"             "Mormodes"           "Galedupa"          
#> [277] "Claoxylon"          "Dicranum"           "Dysoxylum"         
#> [280] "Limnia"             "Harrisia"           "Gonospermum"       
#> [283] "Epacris"            "Chrysoscias"        "Monosalpinx"       
#> [286] "Prinos"             "Medicago"           "Gordonia"          
#> [289] "Achillea"           "Cyanea"             "Rinorea"           
#> [292] "Lapathum"           "Brachyscias"        "Macranthera"       
#> [295] "Thibaudia"          "Mayna"              "Rhizomnium"        
#> [298] "Asclepias"          "Achyrocline"        "Rosulabryum"       
#> [301] "Coussapoa"          "Meineckia"          "Aconitum"          
#> [304] "Deiregyne"          "Syncarpha"          "Graffenrieda"      
#> [307] "Paederota"          "Wissadula"          "Psilolepus"        
#> [310] "Pulmonaria"         "Acanthophyllum"     "Anemia"            
#> [313] "Spermacoce"         "Meriania"           "Tetracera"         
#> [316] "Ellipanthus"        "Luckhoffia"         "Talinum"           
#> [319] "Bromus"             "Acanthophyllum"     "Trigonospora"      
#> [322] "Fagelia"            "Trigonospora"       "Chesneya"          
#> [325] "Rinzia"             "Helemonium"         "Sertuernera"       
#> [328] "Hygrohypnum"        "Pseudanthus"        "Tibouchina"        
#> [331] "Lannea"             "Bryonia"            "Amphymenium"       
#> [334] "Deiregyne"          "Hymenophyllum"      "Sesamum"           
#> [337] "Dactylorhiza"       "Bromopsis"          "Dampiera"          
#> [340] "Argyrothamnia"      "Riedelia"           "Chileranthemum"    
#> [343] "Cladocolea"         "Asplenidictyum"     "Spinifex"          
#> [346] "Diplophyllum"       "Cyanea"             "Gollania"          
#> [349] "Cephalorhizum"      "Liparia"            "Loricaria"         
#> [352] "Polytrichadelphus"  "Litsea"             "Chiloglottis"      
#> [355] "Sphaerocephalus"    "Tylimanthus"        "Gustavia"          
#> [358] "Saprosma"           "Chiloglottis"       "Andryala"          
#> [361] "Zamia"              "Terebinthina"       "Luckhoffia"        
#> [364] "Heteromma"          "Encholirium"        "Pera"              
#> [367] "Thamnium"           "Lavatera"           "Fontinalis"        
#> [370] "Caelestina"         "Haworthia"          "Neoapaloxylon"     
#> [373] "Argyrothamnia"      "Ampelocissus"       "Dyckia"            
#> [376] "Rinorea"            "Gentianella"        "Jaegeria"          
#> [379] "Aphananthe"         "Waitzia"            "Gastrodia"         
#> [382] "Trifolium"          "Allochrusa"         "Penstemon"         
#> [385] "Ampelocissus"       "Ribes"              "Galedupa"          
#> [388] "Eriobotrya"         "Galedupa"           "Codonopsis"        
#> [391] "Daviesia"           "Arcuatopterus"      "Jamesonia"         
#> [394] "Pastinaca"          "Cryptogynolejeunea" "Mayna"             
#> [397] "Cayratia"           "Preissia"           "Adenophorus"       
#> [400] "Chileranthemum"     "Leptarrhena"        "Melicytus"         
#> [403] "Narcissus"          "Spinifex"           "Lewisia"           
#> [406] "Chrysopogon"        "Asplenidictyum"     "Neolitsea"         
#> [409] "Leiomela"           "Benthamia"          "Corydalis"         
#> [412] "Cracca"             "Origanum"           "Rafflesia"         
#> [415] "Zelkova"            "Benthamia"          "Rafflesia"         
#> [418] "Spiesia"            "Plantago"           "Dendroceros"       
#> [421] "Allochrusa"         "Antrocaryon"        "Salix"             
#> [424] "Xolantha"           "Piptocarpha"        "Melastomastrum"    
#> [427] "Costularia"         "Microlicia"         "Loricaria"         
#> [430] "Corydalis"          "Pterobryon"         "Stissera"          
#> [433] "Splachnobryum"      "Aethionema"         "Splachnobryum"     
#> [436] "Lysinema"           "Antirhea"           "Achyrocline"       
#> [439] "Oberonia"           "Hygrohypnum"        "Soleirolia"        
#> [442] "Sphaeropteris"      "Hippeastrum"        "Chrysopogon"       
#> [445] "Ebenus"             "Lannea"             "Tetracera"         
#> [448] "Pterobryon"         "Acmella"            "Orchicoeloglossum" 
#> [451] "Ballota"            "Rhizomnium"         "Epacris"           
#> [454] "Draba"              "Amarenus"           "Evonymopsis"       
#> [457] "Loricaria"          "Melicytus"          "Salix"             
#> [460] "Lecythis"           "Piratinera"         "Trichilia"         
#> [463] "Xysmalobium"        "Trimorpha"          "Sphaerostigma"     
#> [466] "Desmocladus"        "Cryptocoryne"       "Salix"             
#> [469] "Colysis"            "Ectropothecium"     "Rafflesia"         
#> [472] "Bohadschia"         "Desmocladus"        "Jamesonia"         
#> [475] "Calea"              "Phymaspermum"       "Sclerophylax"      
#> [478] "Aster"              "Lepidagathis"       "Elytrigia"         
#> [481] "Sphaeropteris"      "Cullen"             "Hippocratea"       
#> [484] "Malva"              "Strychnos"          "Urceocharis"       
#> [487] "Alseodaphne"        "Calathea"           "Ebenus"            
#> [490] "Talinum"            "Tibouchina"         "Hippocratea"       
#> [493] "Bryobrothera"       "Polytrichadelphus"  "Sphaeropteris"     
#> [496] "Kalmiopsis"         "Anisopappus"        "Acrostichum"       
#> [499] "Amsonia"            "Lethedon"          

ch_taxonomic_epithet()

#> [1] "meyeri"
ch_taxonomic_epithet(10)

#>  [1] "campylosepalum" "decorticans"    "daemia"         "rectinervis"   
#>  [5] "draboides"      "loretiana"      "memoria"        "poculifera"    
#>  [9] "rubro-villosa"  "mzimbana"      
ch_taxonomic_epithet(500)

#>   [1] "ponsiae"            "chrysanthum"        "planadensis"       
#>   [4] "hougasii"           "schottii"           "bauchiensis"       
#>   [7] "cyathiformis"       "hetrusca"           "sergentii"         
#>  [10] "pygmaeus"           "simplicifolia"      "pythiusa"          
#>  [13] "subtorquatum"       "sohayakiense"       "rectifolium"       
#>  [16] "firma"              "sochensis"          "oppositiflora"     
#>  [19] "nothofagicola"      "chungthangensis"    "subrosum"          
#>  [22] "manongarivensis"    "cuspididens"        "barbata"           
#>  [25] "glechomifolia"      "rubro-villosa"      "reclinatum"        
#>  [28] "nowackiana"         "alatipes"           "pilmaiquen"        
#>  [31] "coccinea"           "setifolia"          "selebica"          
#>  [34] "duidae"             "remotum"            "hirta"             
#>  [37] "smolikanum"         "corcovadensis"      "harmandii"         
#>  [40] "rhaphidostegum"     "megaphylla"         "humifusa"          
#>  [43] "pseudonobilis"      "rectinervis"        "sagittifera"       
#>  [46] "nothofagicola"      "cruzensis"          "sidiifolia"        
#>  [49] "greatrexii"         "duidae"             "remotum"           
#>  [52] "graciliflorum"      "concinna"           "fritschii"         
#>  [55] "trematodes"         "rugulosum"          "virginicus"        
#>  [58] "luisense"           "nothofagicola"      "ruddianum"         
#>  [61] "guanshuanus"        "propinqua"          "zangezurus"        
#>  [64] "clavula"            "sulcitana"          "irgisensis"        
#>  [67] "argurica"           "tangutica"          "flabellifera"      
#>  [70] "laruotteana"        "gemmulosus"         "sulcitana"         
#>  [73] "saxatile"           "paludosiformis"     "distincta"         
#>  [76] "subflexuosum"       "boldinghii"         "exscapa"           
#>  [79] "ekmanii"            "aurosicus"          "subcordata"        
#>  [82] "melanogona"         "rhinanthoides"      "diarthrodes"       
#>  [85] "validissima"        "wattsii"            "misantlense"       
#>  [88] "platyloma"          "gaudichaudii"       "luxurians"         
#>  [91] "pentamytera"        "dapsilis"           "setifolia"         
#>  [94] "platyloma"          "bojeri"             "looserii"          
#>  [97] "humifusa"           "draneosa"           "schaubertii"       
#> [100] "radula"             "walkeri"            "odontolipes"       
#> [103] "privigna"           "loretiana"          "glomeriflora"      
#> [106] "henricii"           "saksenanus"         "paludosiformis"    
#> [109] "elastica"           "alatipes"           "privigna"          
#> [112] "ionodesme"          "junghuhniana"       "nummularia"        
#> [115] "lilacina"           "pseudohypnoides"    "arentsii"          
#> [118] "ecalyculatus"       "dimistum"           "jasarum"           
#> [121] "setifolia"          "pulchellus"         "cyathiformis"      
#> [124] "tenuiflorus"        "deltoidea"          "paludosiformis"    
#> [127] "jubata"             "looserii"           "pseudopulcherrimus"
#> [130] "guevarana"          "asperifolium"       "memoria"           
#> [133] "irifica"            "gasparrinii"        "wadoodii"          
#> [136] "hyoserifolium"      "ehrenbergii"        "brevipedunculata"  
#> [139] "vallesiaca"         "campylosepalum"     "roseata"           
#> [142] "sclerocarpum"       "grossheimii"        "crassilimba"       
#> [145] "monachinoi"         "polymorphus"        "viscosa"           
#> [148] "gallica"            "revoluta"           "leucosticton"      
#> [151] "melanogona"         "obanensis"          "rhinanthoides"     
#> [154] "atrata"             "insolitum"          "leptopedicellata"  
#> [157] "wolfii"             "lasionema"          "luisense"          
#> [160] "estevesii"          "cryandra"           "gibbosum"

#> [166] "claytoni"           "insolitum"          "campylosepalum"    
#> [169] "diemii"             "poculifera"         "navicularis"       
#> [172] "cuspididens"        "vieillardi"         "saksenanus"        
#> [175] "silvestris"         "celebica"           "fosteri"           
#> [178] "hippolyti"          "tristyla"           "subflexuosum"      
#> [181] "draneosa"           "rodriguezii"        "poteriifolium"     
#> [184] "urosepala"          "leonae"             "hougasii"          
#> [187] "leiocarpus"         "stylospermum"       "sessilifructa"     
#> [190] "wittrockii"         "obovatum"           "bolanderi"         
#> [193] "distincta"          "mandakatense"       "graciliflorum"     
#> [196] "corcovadensis"      "pinnatisecta"       "insulana"          
#> [199] "ponsiae"            "saxatile"           "flaccidum"         
#> [202] "albenensis"         "polyandrum"         "tulearensis"       
#> [205] "irifica"            "gongshanensis"      "heterodoxa"        
#> [208] "ryeae"              "quassiifolium"      "barrelieri"        
#> [211] "loherianum"         "monachinoi"         "daniel-jimenezii"  
#> [214] "pentamytera"        "oppositiflora"      "rojasiana"         
#> [217] "orbinaxa"           "pulchra"            "selebica"          
#> [220] "theezans"           "meyeri"             "rubropilosa"       
#> [223] "alba-compacta"      "talaverae"          "nowackiana"        
#> [226] "calycantha"         "florulentus"        "lucida"            
#> [229] "cumandae"           "pinnatisecta"       "oreodoxa"          
#> [232] "wilkensii"          "purpuripes"         "kosvinskiense"     
#> [235] "junghuhniana"       "areitiana"          "lasionema"         
#> [238] "coronaria"          "egregia"            "mongolica"         
#> [241] "daralagesicus"      "rojasiana"          "ulotricha"         
#> [244] "flagellaris"        "angavokeliense"     "macerenica"        
#> [247] "callistophyllum"    "fosteri"            "luxurians"         
#> [250] "odontolipes"        "elastica"           "pentamytera"       
#> [253] "aurosicus"          "barbata"            "camschaticum"      
#> [256] "asperifolium"       "multiflorum"        "subcordata"        
#> [259] "flavorubellum"      "smolikanum"         "ebracteatum"       
#> [262] "barrelieri"         "madrensis"          "commixtiforme"     
#> [265] "shuttleworthiana"   "boldinghii"         "cardiocarpa"       
#> [268] "macrostipulata"     "rubro-villosa"      "ixodes"            
#> [271] "garrettii"          "edelbergii"         "uipongensis"       
#> [274] "desmantha"          "portoricensis"      "ehrenbergii"       
#> [277] "chamaedryoides"     "incanus"            "suavis"            
#> [280] "galushkoi"          "manongarivensis"    "gomesiana"         
#> [283] "duidae"             "buseri"             "rubropilosa"       
#> [286] "consanguinea"       "rojasiana"          "sidiifolia"        
#> [289] "erioclados"         "cardiocarpa"        "tangutica"         
#> [292] "brevifolia"         "marifolia"          "multicarpelatus"   
#> [295] "salicifolium"       "ruddianum"          "luisense"          
#> [298] "crassivenia"        "adunca"             "nelumbifolia"      
#> [301] "coccinea"           "egregia"            "aegilicum"         
#> [304] "henricii"           "levynsiae"          "stipulata"         
#> [307] "flocciflora"        "candollei"          "horsfieldii"       
#> [310] "epileuca"           "ulicis"             "ryeae"             
#> [313] "costaricana"        "chamaedryoides"     "platyloma"         
#> [316] "subrepletum"        "luxurians"          "caloptera"         
#> [319] "irgisensis"         "duidae"             "misantlense"       
#> [322] "sessilifructa"      "ebracteatum"        "cuspididens"       
#> [325] "deltoidea"          "ulotricha"          "mysorense"         
#> [328] "privigna"           "laxifoliata"        "goldsacki"         
#> [331] "ecalyculatus"       "emirnense"          "daviesii"

#> [496] "blumeana"           "meyeri"             "flagellaris"       
#> [499] "wattsii"            "wittrockii"        

ch_taxonomic_species()

#> [1] "Kania chamaedryoides"
ch_taxonomic_species(10)

#>  [1] "Desmodium nutans"        "Erepsia jonesii"        
#>  [3] "Pseudanthus lilacina"    "Pulmonaria exscapa"     
#>  [5] "Dyckia subflexuosum"     "Diplophyllum drucei"    
#>  [7] "Adenophorus polymorphus" "Elettariopsis hirta"    
#>  [9] "Senecio plumaeformis"    "Coniogramme gibbosum"   
ch_taxonomic_species(500)

#> [459] "Faurea obovatum"                 "Corydalis commixtiforme"

#> [463] "Echinops sambiranoensis"         "Thecacoris rodriguezii"         
#> [465] "Erechtites pulchra"              "Aphananthe setifolia"           
#> [467] "Lagerstroemia styriacum"         "Alseodaphne bolanderi"          
#> [469] "Tibouchina fosteri"              "Syncarpha pterocarpa"           
#> [471] "Dracaena vallesiaca"             "Lysinema tmolaeus"              
#> [473] "Voacanga guianense"              "Trichilia serrulata"            
#> [475] "Ficinia irgisensis"              "Rosulabryum rubropilosa"        
#> [477] "Helemonium poteriifolium"        "Loricaria hockii"               
#> [479] "Asarum stipulata"                "Aphananthe ehrenbergii"         
#> [481] "Smallanthus melanogona"          "Hippeastrum wagapensis"         
#> [483] "Trisepalum gallica"              "Dimerodontium jubata"           
#> [485] "Tylimanthus kingii"              "Themeda tenuiflorus"            
#> [487] "Synnema stylospermum"            "Podotheca edelbergii"           
#> [489] "Diaphananthe canariensis"        "Tachigali tundrae"              
#> [491] "Cestrum anamensis"               "Antholoma conjunctifolium"      
#> [493] "Thelymitra garrettii"            "Lessertia talaverae"            
#> [495] "Thuidiopsis rectifolium"         "Bulbostylis cuspidatus"

#> [499] "Preissia wilkensii"              "Felicia silvestris"
